title: Heist Blog
description: Content marketing insights, AI tools, and the playbooks we use to run Heist.

items.title: Inside the Generator: How One Idea Becomes 30 On-Brand Posts — Heist
items.summary: Behind the 'month of content in 10 minutes' claim: the six-stage pipeline that turns a single sentence into 30 platform-native posts without ever sounding like six different people wrote them.

items.title: The Feedback Loop: How the Brain Learns From Your Engagement Data — Heist
items.summary: Most AI tools ship content and forget about it. Heist's Brain watches what happens after publish — saves, shares, replies — and rewires its next generation.

items.title: Voice Drift Detection: The Guard Rail No Other AI Tool Has — Heist
items.summary: AI-generated content gets blander over time. A phrase here, a tone shift there. Here's the layer-8 system that catches drift before your audience does.

items.title: The Scheduler: Why Heist's Calendar Isn't Just a Grid — Heist
items.summary: Every scheduler looks the same from the outside. Heist's calendar uses temporal learning and brand rhythm detection to pick publish times the rest of the industry can't.

items.title: 10 Hooks That Stop the Scroll (and How to Steal Them) — Heist
items.summary: Ten proven first-line hook frameworks that stop people mid-scroll, with real examples and rules for when to use each one. Writing hooks is a skill — here's the playbook.

items.title: Why Every AI Content Tool Forgets You — Heist Brain Blog
items.summary: You explain your brand to AI. It generates content. It forgets everything. Here's why most AI content tools are broken — and what brand memory changes about content creation.

items.title: How to Batch a Week of Social Content in 30 Minutes — Heist
items.summary: A step-by-step workflow for planning and generating a full week of social posts in a single half-hour sitting. Batching is a skill. Here's how to do it without burning out.

items.title: Brand Voice: How to Define It So AI Can Actually Use It — Heist
items.summary: Most brand voice guides are useless for AI. They say things like 'friendly but professional.' Here's how to write a brand voice document that a generator can actually follow — with examples.

items.title: One Tool vs. Four: The Real Cost of Your Content Stack — Heist
items.summary: Jasper + Buffer + WordPress + analytics = roughly $150/mo and 5 hours lost to switching. Here's what happens when AI generation, scheduling, analytics, and blogging live in one tool.

items.title: The Brain: 10 Layers of AI Memory That Change Everything — Heist
items.summary: Most AI tools have one layer of context. The Brain has ten — from brand voice profiles to performance learning. Here's what each layer does and why it makes AI content actually sound like you.

items.title: Writing for Six Platforms Without Losing Your Voice — Heist
items.summary: LinkedIn, X, Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, YouTube — six algorithms, six formats, one voice. Here's how to adapt your content without sounding like six different people.

items.title: AI Content Tools: The Honest Buyer's Guide (2026)
items.summary: An honest, detailed buyer's guide to AI content tools in 2026. What actually differentiates them, what to look for, and how to avoid the common mistakes.

items.title: Brand Voice Framework: The Complete Guide (2026)
items.summary: The complete framework for defining a brand voice that AI tools can actually use. Real structure, real examples, no adjective soup.

items.title: The Complete Guide to Content Marketing in 2026
items.summary: A complete, honest guide to content marketing in 2026. How the algorithms actually work, what actually drives ROI, and the playbooks that work for real teams.

items.title: Heist Guides — Long-Form Content Marketing Playbooks
items.summary: In-depth guides for content marketing, brand voice, multi-platform strategy, and AI tools. 3,000+ word playbooks, not fluff.

items.title: Multi-Platform Content Strategy: The Complete Framework (2026)
items.summary: How to run a multi-platform content strategy without losing your voice or burning out. The complete framework with real playbooks.
